audit_items.proof_trace: ValidateTransactions iterates all transactions via for loop (lines 277-288) calling IsWellFormed on each. ValidateSuggestedBlock unconditionally calls ValidateTransactions (line 82). ValidateOrphanedBlock is NOT an acceptance path—it returns Syncing for blocks without parents, which are cached and later revalidated via ValidateSuggestedBlock when the parent becomes available.
